name: Vanadiumcorp Resource Inc.
summary: Vanadiumcorp Resource Inc., a junior resource company, engages in the acquisition and exploration of mineral properties in Canada. The company explores for vanadium, titanium, iron, copper, gold, and nickel deposits. Its flagship project is the Lac Dor√É¬© Vanadium project covering approximately 45 square kilometers located in Quebec, Canada. It is also involved in the vanadium redox flow battery development business in Germany. The company was formerly known as PacificOre Mining Corp. and changed its name to Vanadiumcorp Resource Inc. in November 2013. Vanadiumcorp Resource Inc. was incorporated in 1980 and is based in Vancouver, Canada.
